form.formComment: At the latest run 2nd of 7 at Palermo Turf on March 20 over 1600m, nose behind Hi Koll carrying 52kg at $21.10. Before that 6th of 10 at this track on March 4 over 1600m, 7 len behind Dulce Demanda with 52kg at $41.85. Put the writing on the wall last time.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 8th of 11 at this track on March 10 over 1200m, 13 len behind Tonteria Frank with 52kg at $173.40. Second-up ran last of 7 at this track on March 28 over 1400m, on heavy track; 16 len behind Bay View carrying 52kg at $203.70. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start ran last of 8 at Palermo on June 13 over 1200m, 14 len behind Envidiada with 55kg at $12.80.
